chapter_title.en: Chapter on Prohibition of Shedding Blood and Taking Wealth Unlawfully, the Prohibition of Engaging in the Impermissible, and Repentance From Killing Whether Intentional or Accidental

text: 5155 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ اَلْعَلاَءِ عَنِ اَلثُّمَالِيِّ قَالَ: "لَوْ أَنَّ رَجُلاً ضَرَبَ رَجُلاً سَوْطاً لَضَرَبَهُ اَللَّهُ سَوْطاً مِنَ اَلنَّارِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5155 - In the narration of Al-Alaa from Al-Thumali, that Imam (as) said:
"If a man were to strike another man with a whip, Allah (swt) would strike him with a whip of fire."
